statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // "Claude"'); total_in=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_out=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total=$(( total_in + total_out )); if [ "$total" -ge 1000 ]; then tok=$(printf '%.1fk' "$(echo "scale=1; $total / 1000" | bc)"); else tok="$total"; fi; line="$model"; [ "$total" -gt 0 ] && line="$line · ${tok} tok"; [ -n "$used_pct" ] && line="$line · ctx:$(printf '%.0f' "$used_pct")%"; printf '\033[2m%s\033[0m\n' "$line"
